creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
print/acroread9 and their localized versions are vulnerable.
	http://www.adobe.com/support/security/bulletins/apsb10-07.html

Fix: 

AdobeReader 9.3.1 is available for print/, german/, french/, and japanese/.
	here are their checksums.
